name: Engage Court Shorts
description: The Engage Court Shorts are built for athletic movement with a 7-inch inseam and gusseted crotch for unrestricted lateral reach. Deep side pockets hold multiple balls, and the lightweight woven fabric dries quickly after sweaty sessions. Elastic waistband with internal drawcord.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold. The DWR (durable water repellent) finish will diminish over time — tumble dry on low heat periodically to reactivate the treatment.
